name: bananasplitz
title: BananaSplitz
description: Browse your Banana Split groups, balances and transactions
author: bubu_ding

tools.name: list-my-balances
tools.title: List My Balances
tools.description: List outstanding balances for the authenticated user across all chats (user-level API key only). Each chat row includes counterparties filtered to pairs involving the caller.

tools.name: list-my-spending
tools.title: List My Spending
tools.description: Sum the authenticated user's expense shares per chat for one month (user-level API key only). Amount = caller's share of expenses dated in the given UTC month. Does not count settlements.

tools.name: list-counterparty-balances
tools.title: List Counterparty Balances
tools.description: List per-counterparty balance totals across all groups in a chosen base currency (user-level API key only). Use to answer how much you owe or are owed per person across all groups.

tools.name: settle-all-with
tools.title: Settle All with User
tools.description: Zero out every per-group balance with one user (writes one Settlement per chat in native currency). User-level API key only. Requires confirmation before executing.

tools.name: list-chats
tools.title: List Chats
tools.description: List all expense-tracking chats/groups. Use to find the chat ID when the user doesn't provide one.

tools.name: get-chat
tools.title: Get Chat
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific chat/group including members. Use to verify a chat exists, get base currency, and resolve member user IDs before mutating.

tools.name: get-debts
tools.title: Get Debts
tools.description: Get all outstanding debts in a chat (all currencies). Use to see individual debts before simplification.

tools.name: get-simplified-debts
tools.title: Get Simplified Debts
tools.description: Get optimized/simplified debt graph for a chat in a specific currency. Currency is required. Use to see the most efficient way to settle all debts.

tools.name: update-chat-settings
tools.title: Update Chat Settings
tools.description: Update chat settings (debt simplification, base currency, notification toggles). Requires confirmation.

tools.name: list-expenses
tools.title: List Expenses
tools.description: List all expenses in a chat. Optional currency and category filters. Each expense includes categoryLabel when assigned.

tools.name: get-expense
tools.title: Get Expense
tools.description: Get full details of a specific expense including split. Use before updating an expense.

tools.name: create-expense
tools.title: Create Expense
tools.description: Create a new expense with automatic split calculation. Always resolve chat and member IDs via get-chat first. Requires confirmation (may notify the group).

tools.name: update-expense
tools.title: Update Expense
tools.description: Update an existing expense. Omitted fields keep current values. Use get-expense first if needed. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: delete-expense
tools.title: Delete Expense
tools.description: Delete an expense by ID. Cannot be undone. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: get-net-share
tools.title: Get Net Share
tools.description: Get the net balance between two users in a chat for one currency. Use before creating a settlement.

tools.name: get-totals
tools.title: Get Totals
tools.description: Get total borrowed and lent amounts for a user in a chat.

tools.name: bulk-import-expenses
tools.title: Bulk Import Expenses
tools.description: Import multiple expenses from a JSON array (same fields as create-expense rows). Optional notify for a condensed Telegram summary. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: bulk-update-expenses
tools.title: Bulk Update Expenses
tools.description: Update multiple expenses from a JSON array of partial updates keyed by expenseId. Per-row failures reported; batch does not abort. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: list-categories
tools.title: List Categories
tools.description: List base + custom categories in a chat (id, emoji, title, kind). Use ids like base:food or chat:<uuid> on expenses.

tools.name: list-settlements
tools.title: List Settlements
tools.description: List all debt settlements in a chat. Optional currency filter.

tools.name: create-settlement
tools.title: Create Settlement
tools.description: Record a debt settlement/payment between two users. Use get-net-share first to verify the debt. Requires confirmation (notifies the group).

tools.name: delete-settlement
tools.title: Delete Settlement
tools.description: Delete a settlement by ID (undo a payment). Requires confirmation.

tools.name: settle-all-debts
tools.title: Settle All Debts
tools.description: Settle all debts between two users in a chat using a JSON balances array per currency. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: list-snapshots
tools.title: List Snapshots
tools.description: List all expense snapshots in a chat.

tools.name: get-snapshot
tools.title: Get Snapshot
tools.description: Get full details of a snapshot including which expenses are included.

tools.name: create-snapshot
tools.title: Create Snapshot
tools.description: Create an expense snapshot grouping specific expenses. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: update-snapshot
tools.title: Update Snapshot
tools.description: Update a snapshot title and associated expense IDs. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: delete-snapshot
tools.title: Delete Snapshot
tools.description: Delete a snapshot (underlying expenses are not deleted). Requires confirmation.

tools.name: list-recurring-expenses
tools.title: List Recurring Expenses
tools.description: List active recurring expense templates in a chat.

tools.name: get-recurring-expense
tools.title: Get Recurring Expense
tools.description: Get details for a recurring expense template (schedule, amount, etc.).

tools.name: update-recurring-expense
tools.title: Update Recurring Expense
tools.description: Update schedule or details of a recurring template. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: cancel-recurring-expense
tools.title: Cancel Recurring Expense
tools.description: Cancel an active recurring template (stops future runs only). Requires confirmation.

tools.name: send-group-reminder
tools.title: Send Group Reminder
tools.description: Send a Telegram group message about outstanding debts. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: send-debt-reminder
tools.title: Send Debt Reminder
tools.description: Send an individual debt reminder in a Telegram group. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: get-exchange-rate
tools.title: Get Exchange Rate
tools.description: Get the current exchange rate between two ISO 4217 currencies.

ai.instructions:
Banana Split expense tracking via tRPC with the user's API key from extension preferences.

API key scope:
- User-level key: cross-group tools (list-my-balances, list-my-spending, list-counterparty-balances, settle-all-with, list-chats) work without chatId.
- Chat-scoped key: omit chatId on chat commands; the API resolves the scoped chat automatically.
- If chatId is missing and the key is not chat-scoped, call list-chats or ask the user.

Money: amounts use decimal precision; always show ISO currency codes (USD, SGD). Never guess user/chat IDs — call get-chat and use member ids before create-expense, settlements, or reminders.

Reads return JSON strings. Prefer concise summaries for the user; cite currencies and counterparties clearly.

Writes and notifications: destructive or mutating tools (create/update/delete expense, settlements, settle-all-*, reminders, snapshots, recurring changes, bulk import/update, update-chat-settings) require Raycast confirmation — do not bypass. Settlements and expenses may notify Telegram group members.

Splits: EQUAL needs no customSplits; EXACT/PERCENTAGE/SHARES need customSplits JSON array. Include the payer in participantIds when they share the expense.

Categories: use list-categories; ids are base:<slug> or chat:<uuid>; pass category "none" to clear.

Bulk tools: pass expenses or updates as a JSON string array in the json field (not a file path).

Recurring: templateId for recurring commands; expenseId for normal expenses.

evals.input: @bananasplitz who owes me money across all groups?
@bananasplitz log a $45 dinner split equally in chat 123456789, payer is me (user 111), participants 111 and 222
@bananasplitz settle everything I owe Alex (user 456) across all groups
@bananasplitz what are the simplified debts in Beach House chat 99 in USD?

commands.name: people
commands.title: People
commands.subtitle: Banana Split Balances
commands.description: Settle balances and nudge people across all your groups

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your Banana Split user-level API key

preferences.name: apiUrl
preferences.title: API URL
preferences.description: Banana Split tRPC endpoint base URL

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
